config.expression: if(isNull({session.custom.cell.name}) || {session.custom.cell.name} = "", "No cell bound", {session.custom.cell.name}) + "  ·  Dedicated terminal - operator-driven count - no MIP per-piece handshake"
if({session.custom.closureMethod} = "ByCount", "By Count", if({session.custom.closureMethod} = "ByWeight", "By Weight", if({session.custom.closureMethod} = "ByVision", "By Vision", "-")))

config.script: system.perspective.openPopup("mpp-inventory", "BlueRidge/Components/PlantFloor/InventoryManager", params={"locationId": self.session.custom.cell.locationId}, modal=False, showCloseIcon=True, draggable=True, resizable=True)

tooltip.text: Check component / pass-through inventory in to this line

config.expression: if(isNull({session.custom.cell.locationId}), 'No cell bound to see its open container.', 'No open container - pick a finished good below and complete the first tray to open one.')

if(isNull({view.custom.container.Id}), if({view.custom.fgConfig.TraysPerContainer} > 0, 'Per-Tray Close - first tray opens a container (' + toStr({view.custom.fgConfig.TraysPerContainer}) + ' trays x ' + toStr({view.custom.fgConfig.PartsPerTray}) + ' parts/tray)', 'Per-Tray Close - completing the first tray opens a container'), 'Per-Tray Close - ' + if({session.custom.closureMethod} = "ByVision", "Vision", if({session.custom.closureMethod} = "ByWeight", "Weight", "Count")) + ' - Tray ' + toStr(({view.custom.container.ClosedTrays} + 1)) + ' of ' + toStr({view.custom.container.TraysPerContainer}))

props.text: The Cognex camera scans the full tray as a single image once the PLC asserts TrayFullFlag at PartsPerTray - one validation event per tray, never per piece. On PASS, the tray closes and BOM consumption is recorded for that tray. Container fill is the MES-side accumulation of validated tray closes - same camera, same closure path as the Sort Cage non-serialized re-pack flow.
TrayPresent: FALSE - Awaiting next tray placement - TrayFullFlag: FALSE
Waiting for scale - PLC closes the container at target weight.

config.expression: if({view.custom.closureRaw} = "ByCount", "By Count", if({view.custom.closureRaw} = "ByWeight", "By Weight", if({view.custom.closureRaw} = "ByVision", "By Vision", if(isNull({view.custom.closureRaw}) || {view.custom.closureRaw} = "", "-", {view.custom.closureRaw}))))

props.text: Same atomic close as Serialized - claims AIM ID, dispatches print async
When accumulated tray closes reach the configured Container capacity:
- AIM Shipper ID claimed from local pool (per-Part-Number FIFO, sub-millisecond)
- ShippingLabel row inserted with PrintedAt = NULL
- Async print dispatched to Zebra at this terminal

config.script:
c = self.view.custom.container
	cellId = self.session.custom.cell.locationId
	if not c or c.get("Id") is None:
		BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult({"Status": False, "Message": "No open container at this cell."}, "Assembly")
		return
	result = BlueRidge.Lots.Container.complete(c.get("Id"), operatorConfirmed=True, terminalLocationId=cellId)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(result, "Container complete")
	if result and result.get("Status"):
		self.view.custom.refreshToken = (self.view.custom.refreshToken or 0) + 1
